channel.title: GitHub Julia Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Julia in GitHub

item.title: JuliaRegistries/General
item.description: The official registry of general Julia packages

item.title: andreasKroepelin/polylux
item.description: A package for creating slides in Typst

item.title: TuringLang/DynamicPPL.jl
item.description: Implementation of domain-specific language (DSL) for dynamic probabilistic programming

item.title: BioJulia/BioStructures.jl
item.description: A Julia package to read, write and manipulate macromolecular structures

item.title: SciML/ModelingToolkit.jl
item.description: An acausal modeling framework for automatically parallelized scientific machine learning (SciML) in Julia. A computer algebra system for integrated symbolics for physics-informed machine learning and automated transformations of differential equations

item.title: SciML/DataInterpolations.jl
item.description: A library of data interpolation and smoothing functions

item.title: CliMA/ClimaOcean.jl
item.description: 🌎 Framework for realistic regional-to-global ocean simulations, and coupled ocean + sea-ice simulations based on Oceananigans and ClimaSeaIce. Basis for the ocean and sea-ice component of CliMA's Earth system model.

item.title: JuliaPlots/Plots.jl
item.description: Powerful convenience for Julia visualizations and data analysis
